findings.evidence: `rg -n "Matrix\.Symmetric|IsSymm|isSymm" code/TauCeti/Analysis/PDE/UniformEllipticity.lean code/TauCeti/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/SymmetricPart.lean` shows the PDE file only has the import at line 9; all actual `IsSymm` declarations are in `LinearAlgebra/Matrix/SymmetricPart.lean:61,66`.
findings.fix: Remove the direct `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Matrix.Symmetric` import from `UniformEllipticity.lean` and rely on `TauCeti.LinearAlgebra.Matrix.SymmetricPart` for the symmetric-part API.
findings.issue: `import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Matrix.Symmetric` is no longer used directly in this PDE file; the only `IsSymm`/`isSymm` uses are in `TauCeti.LinearAlgebra.Matrix.SymmetricPart`, which is already imported.

summary: The new declarations are now in their natural linear-algebra and PDE homes, but the PDE file keeps an evidently unused Mathlib symmetric-matrix import.
